engineGuide.h2: Peugeot 807 Engine Codes - Full Technical Specifications & Replacement Guide
engineGuide.h3: Every engine code fitted to the Peugeot 807 across all generations, with technical specs, compatible variants and trims, known failure points, and average rebuilt prices from UK specialists. Select any engine code to compare quotes.

entries.title: 2.0L Diesel
entries.history: The most common 807 diesel code; 136hp turbo unit powering Executive and Sport trims with strong torque for family hauling.
compatibleVariants: 2.0 HDi Executive, 2.0 HDi Executive SE, 2.0 HDi Sport, 2.0 HDi SV
commonFailures: EGR valve clogging causing reduced power at 60k-90k miles
Injector seal leaks leading to diesel chuffing noise
Turbo actuator sticking on higher-mileage units
entries.cta: Get quotes for RHR Peugeot 807 engine replacement

entries.title: 2.0L Diesel
entries.history: Early low-output DW10 variant; budget-friendly option for LX and entry-level trims with simpler emissions hardware.
compatibleVariants: 2.0 HDi LX, 2.0 HDi GLX, 2.0 HDi S
commonFailures: EGR cooler carbon buildup reducing efficiency
Water pump failure near timing belt intervals
Cam belt tensioner wear on pre-2005 units

entries.title: 2.0L Diesel
entries.history: Sport-spec DW10 with enhanced mapping; favoured by enthusiasts for responsive throttle and towing capability.
commonFailures: Turbo wastegate actuator failure causing boost loss
DPF clogging on post-2008 Phase 2 models
Injector carbon fouling from short-journey use
entries.cta: Get quotes for RHW Peugeot 807 engine replacement

entries.title: 2.0L Diesel
entries.history: Fleet-oriented DW10 variant; balanced power and economy for high-mileage Family and commercial-spec 807s.
compatibleVariants: 2.0 HDi Family, 2.0 HDi Fleet Spec, 2.0 HDi SV
commonFailures: EGR valve sticking causing rough idle
Timing belt tensioner premature wear
Oil consumption from piston ring wear over 100k miles

entries.history: Entry-level DW10 code; reliable workhorse for budget-conscious owners with basic trim specifications.

commonProblems.h2: Peugeot 807 Engine Problems - What It Costs to Fix & When Replacement Makes Sense
commonProblems.h3: The Peugeot 807's DW10 and DW12 diesel engines dominate UK replacement enquiries, with EGR clogging and timing belt tensioner failures being the most reported issues. Every rebuilt engine supplied through EngineMarket includes upgraded internal components designed to address the original failure point - plus a Peugeotmum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty. Use this section to compare repair costs and decide whether a targeted fix or full replacement offers better value for your 807.

problems.h4: Peugeot 807 EGR Valve Clogging - Why HDi Engines Lose Power
problems.affectedModels: Peugeot 807 2.0 HDi LX, SV, Executive (2002-2014, DW10 RHR/RHS/RHW), 2.2 HDi Executive, GT (2003-2014, DW12 4HX/4HP)
problems.rootCause: Exhaust gas recirculation valve accumulates carbon deposits from diesel combustion, restricting airflow and triggering limp mode to protect the engine.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove, clean or replace EGR valve and associated pipework
repairOptions.longevity: Restores power if caught early; may recur if driving pattern unchanged

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace EGR valve, cooler, pipework and update ECU mapping
repairOptions.longevity: Longer-term fix; recommended if valve has failed multiple times

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt DW10/DW12 engine with upgraded EGR components
repairOptions.longevity: Permanent solution; includes 12-month warranty and addresses all wear items

problems.recommendation: On a Peugeot 807 worth £2,000-£4,500, an EGR clean or replacement is often the sensible first step if the engine otherwise runs well. However, if the vehicle has exceeded 90k miles or shows signs of turbo or injector wear, a rebuilt engine may offer better long-term value and peace of mind.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt DW10 engine prices for your Peugeot 807

problems.h4: Peugeot 807 Timing Belt Tensioner Failure - DW12 Catastrophic Risk
problems.affectedModels: Peugeot 807 2.2 HDi Executive, GT, Sport (2003-2014, DW12 4HP/4HX/4HY)
problems.rootCause: The timing belt tensioner on DW12 engines can fail prematurely due to bearing wear or water ingress, causing belt jump and valve-to-piston contact.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace timing belt, tensioner, idler pulleys and water pump
repairOptions.longevity: Essential preventative maintenance; must be done before failure occurs

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt DW12 engine with upgraded timing components
repairOptions.longevity: Only option if belt has snapped; includes warranty and addresses collateral damage

problems.recommendation: If your Peugeot 807 2.2 HDi is approaching 70k miles and the timing belt history is unknown, invest in a preventative belt kit immediately. Once the tensioner fails and valves bend, only a rebuilt engine will restore reliability - and at that point, the cost often exceeds the vehicle's value.
problems.cta: Get quotes for DW12 Peugeot 807 engine replacement

problems.h4: Peugeot 807 Turbo Actuator Fault - Boost Pressure Loss
problems.affectedModels: Peugeot 807 2.0 HDi Sport, Executive (2002-2014, DW10 RHW/RHR), 2.2 HDi GT (2004-2014, DW12 4HP/4HY)
problems.rootCause: Turbocharger variable vane actuator sticks or fails electrically due to carbon buildup or moisture, causing reduced boost, limp mode and poor acceleration.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove turbo, clean vanes or replace actuator motor and linkage
repairOptions.longevity: Effective if turbo core is healthy; may not resolve if turbine is worn

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Strip, clean, replace bearings/seals and balance turbocharger assembly
repairOptions.longevity: Good middle ground if actuator failure was early warning of wider turbo wear

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt engine with upgraded turbo and ancillaries
repairOptions.longevity: Best value if engine has other wear; includes warranty and full reliability reset

problems.recommendation: Turbo actuator faults on the Peugeot 807 often signal broader turbo wear. If the vehicle has high mileage or other symptoms like oil consumption, a rebuilt engine with upgraded turbo components typically offers better long-term value than repeated turbo repairs.
problems.cta: Compare Peugeot 807 turbo diesel engine replacement prices

problems.h4: Peugeot 807 Injector Seal Leak - Diesel Chuffing & Cabin Odour
problems.affectedModels: Peugeot 807 2.0 HDi Executive, SV, Sport (2002-2014, DW10 RHR/RHW/RHG), 2.2 HDi Executive (2003-2014, DW12 4HX)
problems.rootCause: Copper injector seals harden and crack with age/heat, allowing high-pressure diesel to escape into the cylinder head, causing chuffing noise and diesel smell in the cabin.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove injectors, replace copper seals and washers, recalibrate
repairOptions.longevity: Effective if injectors themselves are healthy; relatively quick fix

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove, test and refurbish or replace faulty injectors plus seals
repairOptions.longevity: Recommended if injectors show poor spray pattern or high leak-off

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt engine with upgraded injectors and seals
repairOptions.longevity: Best option if multiple injectors failed or cylinder head is damaged

problems.recommendation: Injector seal leaks on the Peugeot 807 are often a straightforward fix if caught early. However, if diesel has contaminated the oil or damaged the cylinder head, or if multiple injectors are failing, a rebuilt engine with upgraded fuel system components provides a more reliable long-term solution.
problems.cta: Get quotes for Peugeot 807 DW10 injector repair or replacement

problems.h4: Peugeot 807 DPF Regeneration Failure - Post-2008 Diesel Issue
problems.affectedModels: Peugeot 807 2.0 HDi SV, Executive (2008-2014, DW10 RHF/RHR), 2.2 HDi GT, Executive (2008-2014, DW12 4HP/4HX)
problems.rootCause: Diesel particulate filter becomes clogged with soot when the vehicle is used primarily for short journeys, preventing successful regeneration and triggering limp mode or warning lights.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Diagnostic reset and forced DPF regeneration cycle via specialist equipment
repairOptions.longevity: Effective if filter is not physically damaged; requires longer motorway drives afterward

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove old DPF, fit new or professionally cleaned unit with sensors
repairOptions.longevity: Necessary if filter is cracked or ash-clogged; restores emissions compliance

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt engine with upgraded DPF system or delete option where legal
repairOptions.longevity: Best value if engine has other wear; includes warranty and full reliability reset

problems.recommendation: DPF issues on the Peugeot 807 are often driving-pattern related. If your vehicle is used for short trips, a forced regeneration and lifestyle change may resolve it. However, if the DPF is physically damaged or the engine has other wear, a rebuilt engine with an upgraded emissions system offers a more permanent solution.
problems.cta: Compare Peugeot 807 DPF-equipped diesel engine prices

finalCta.h4: Don't Let Engine Failure Write Off Your Peugeot 807
finalCta.paragraph: Whether you're facing EGR clogging, timing belt tensioner failure, turbo issues or DPF problems, EngineMarket makes it simple to compare prices from trusted UK Peugeot 807 specialists. Every rebuilt engine includes upgraded components designed to address the original failure point, plus a Peugeotmum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty and nationwide delivery. Compare prices today and get back on the road without the main dealer premium.
finalCta.buttonText: Compare Peugeot 807 Engine Replacement Prices Now →
finalCta.disclaimer: All prices are indicative UK market ranges based on historical quote data and repair requests from our network of engine specialists. Dealer pricing is estimated based on published main dealer labour rates and genuine OEM parts pricing. Specialist pricing reflects actual quote data from EngineMarket's UK network. Actual costs vary depending on damage severity, vehicle condition, variant, and workshop location within the UK. Use our free comparison tool to get tailored quotes for your specific Peugeot 807 and engine code. Every engine supplied through EngineMarket carries a Peugeotmum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty - always confirm exact terms with your chosen supplier.

engineSizes.intro: Every displacement fitted to the Peugeot 807 is listed below, with compatible engine codes, production years and common failure notes to help you identify the right replacement.

items.title: Peugeot 807 2.0L Diesel Engines
items.description: The 2.0L DW10 diesel was the backbone of the Peugeot 807 range, powering entry-level LX through to Executive and Sport trims from launch to end of production. Its balance of torque, economy and parts availability made it the most-searched diesel option for replacement enquiries.
commonFailurePoints: turbo actuator sticking on higher-mileage units
items.cta: Get quotes for Peugeot 807 2.0L diesel engines

items.title: Peugeot 807 2.2L Diesel Engines
items.description: The larger 2.2L DW12 diesel debuted in 2003 for Executive and GT trims, offering enhanced torque and refinement for towing and motorway cruising. Post-2008 Phase 2 models added DPF hardware, increasing complexity but improving emissions compliance.
commonFailurePoints: DPF regeneration issues on post-2008 models
items.cta: Get quotes for Peugeot 807 2.2L diesel engines

items.title: Peugeot 807 2.0L Petrol Engines
items.description: The naturally-aspirated 2.0L EW10 petrol engine provided reliable, simple power for SE, GLX and Executive petrol variants. Its straightforward design and wide parts availability make it a cost-effective replacement option for non-diesel 807 owners.
commonFailurePoints: Head gasket failure on overheated units

items.title: Peugeot 807 2.2L Petrol Engines
items.description: The 2.2L EW12 petrol offered a step up in power and refinement for Executive and SE petrol models during the Phase 1 production run. Its larger displacement delivered smoother acceleration but was discontinued after the 2006 facelift.
commonFailurePoints: oil consumption from piston ring wear

items.title: Peugeot 807 3.0L Petrol Engines
items.description: The flagship 3.0L ES9 V6 petrol engine powered top-spec Executive and GT models from 2004-2006, delivering smooth, refined power for premium buyers. Its complexity and rarity mean replacement costs are higher, but it remains sought-after for performance-oriented 807 owners. Not sure which engine size your Peugeot 807 needs? Enter your registration number above - we'll identify the exact displacement, engine code and compatible replacement options instantly. All engines supplied through EngineMarket include a Peugeotmum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty from UK Peugeot 807 specialists.
commonFailurePoints: Oil consumption from piston ring wear
timing chain tensioner wear causing cold-start rattle

fuelTypes.intro: Choose your Peugeot 807 engine by fuel type to compare realistic replacement prices, known issues, and compatible UK supply options - from early 2.0L HDi to the latest DPF-equipped DW12.

items.title: Peugeot 807 Diesel Engines
items.description: Diesel engines dominated the Peugeot 807 range from 2002-2014, with DW10 and DW12 families powering most UK registrations and generating the highest replacement enquiry volume.
items.descriptor: Diesel engines dominated the Peugeot 807 range from 2002-2014, with DW10 and DW12 families powering most UK registrations and generating the highest replacement enquiry volume.
families: DW10 (RHR/RHS) - most common 2.0L HDi code; EGR and injector seal issues at higher mileage
DW12 (4HP/4HX) - premium 2.2L HDi; timing belt tensioner failure risk requires preventative attention
DW10ATED4 (RHW) - turbo-enhanced 2.0L; actuator faults and DPF clogging on post-2008 models
foundIn: Phase 1 MPV (2002-2006) - DW10 RHS/RHR, DW12 4HX introduced 2003
Phase 2 Facelift MPV (2007-2014) - updated DW10 RHF/RHG, DW12 4HP with DPF hardware
knownFor: Strong motorway fuel economy and high-mileage durability when maintained
EGR valve clogging and injector seal leaks common on urban-use vehicles
Timing belt tensioner failure on DW12 requires strict adherence to service intervals
High UK replacement demand on 2.0 HDi Executive and 2.2 HDi GT variants
items.cta: Get quotes for Peugeot 807 Diesel replacement engines

items.title: Peugeot 807 Petrol Engines
items.description: Petrol engines offered simpler maintenance and lower emissions complexity for the Peugeot 807, with EW10 and ES9 families powering SE, Executive and V6 performance variants.
items.descriptor: Petrol engines offered simpler maintenance and lower emissions complexity for the Peugeot 807, with EW10 and ES9 families powering SE, Executive and V6 performance variants.
families: EW10 (RFN/RFJ) - reliable 2.0L naturally-aspirated; head gasket and timing belt attention needed
EW12 (3FZ) - smoother 2.2L option for Phase 1 Executive; discontinued after 2006 facelift
ES9 (XFW/XFX) - flagship 3.0L V6; oil consumption and timing chain wear on high-mileage units
foundIn: Phase 1 MPV (2002-2006) - EW10 RFN/RFJ, EW12 3FZ, ES9 XFW introduced 2004
Phase 2 Facelift MPV (2007-2014) - EW10 RFJ/RFK continued; V6 discontinued after 2006
knownFor: Simpler maintenance profile with no DPF or complex emissions hardware
Timing belt replacement critical at 70k miles to avoid catastrophic failure
Lower replacement demand than diesel but steady enquiries for Executive petrol variants
V6 models command premium pricing due to rarity and performance specification

engineYears.h2: Peugeot 807 Engines by Year - What Was Fitted & When
engineYears.intro: This section covers all major engine changes across the Peugeot 807's 2002-2014 production timeline, organised so owners can quickly identify their engine and compare rebuilt engine prices from UK specialists.

years.preview: Phase 1 Launch: EW10 Petrol & DW10 Diesel Debut
years.description: The original Peugeot 807 launched with reliable EW10 petrol and DW10 diesel engines, establishing the MPV's reputation for family practicality and motorway refinement.
keyChanges: Model launch with LX, GLX, SE and Executive trim levels
DW10 2.0L HDi diesel introduced with 107-136hp outputs
EW10 2.0L petrol offered as naturally-aspirated alternative
ES9 3.0L V6 added in 2004 for flagship Executive models
knownFor: DW10 diesel praised for torque and economy on long journeys
Early RHS codes had cam belt tensioner sensitivity; RHR improved durability
V6 XFW offered smooth refinement but higher running costs
EGR clogging emerged as common issue on urban-use diesel models
years.cta: Get quotes for 2002-2006 Peugeot 807 replacement engines
years.ticker: Peugeot 807 2.0 HDi engine replacement • Peugeot 807 DW10 EGR valve failure • Peugeot 807 3.0 V6 engine cost

years.description: The larger DW12 2.2L HDi diesel debuted in 2003, offering enhanced torque and refinement for Executive and GT trims but introducing timing belt tensioner sensitivity.
keyChanges: DW12 2.2L HDi introduced with 128hp (4HX) and later 170hp (4HP) outputs
Executive and GT trims gained premium specification with larger engine option
Timing belt service interval critical at 70k miles to prevent catastrophic failure
knownFor: DW12 offered superior towing capability and motorway refinement
Timing belt tensioner failure became dominant replacement driver for this code
Higher replacement cost than DW10 but valued for performance-oriented owners
Injector seal leaks and EGR issues also reported at higher mileage
years.cta: Get quotes for 2003-2006 Peugeot 807 DW12 replacement engines
years.ticker: Peugeot 807 2.2 HDi timing belt failure • Peugeot 807 DW12 engine replacement cost • Peugeot 807 GT engine for sale

years.preview: Phase 2 Facelift: Updated DW10 & DPF Introduction
years.description: The 2007 facelift brought updated DW10 codes (RHF/RHG) and DPF hardware for Euro 4/5 compliance, changing maintenance requirements for diesel owners.
keyChanges: Phase 2 facelift with revised interior, lighting and trim specifications
DW10 updated to RHF/RHG codes with refined ECU mapping and emissions hardware
DPF introduced on post-2008 diesel models, adding regeneration complexity
DW12 4HP continued with updated calibration for improved emissions
mainEngines: RHF/RHG - 2.0L diesel updated codes (SV / Family / Executive)
RFJ/RFK - 2.0L petrol continued for non-diesel variants
knownFor: DPF regeneration issues emerged as common complaint on short-journey vehicles
Updated DW10 codes improved refinement but retained EGR/injector failure patterns
Phase 2 models command slightly higher replacement values due to newer age
Timing belt discipline remains critical for DW12 regardless of phase
years.cta: Get quotes for 2007-2014 Peugeot 807 replacement engines
years.ticker: Peugeot 807 Phase 2 engine replacement • Peugeot 807 DPF failure repair cost • Peugeot 807 2007+ diesel engine price

engineYears.closing: Not sure which year your Peugeot 807 was built? Enter your registration number and we'll identify the exact engine, model year, and compatible replacement options instantly - all backed by a Peugeotmum 12‑month warranty from UK Peugeot 807 specialists.

faq.h2: Peugeot 807 Engine Replacement - Frequently Asked Questions

items.question: How much does a Peugeot 807 engine replacement cost in the UK?
items.answer: Peugeot 807 engine replacement costs typically range from £495 for a used unit to £2,800 for a fully rebuilt engine, depending on engine code, condition and whether supply & fit is included.
keyPoints: Used DW10 engines start around £495-£1,200 supply only
Reconditioned/rebuilt units range £1,200-£2,800 depending on code
Supply & fit labour adds £450-£850 to engine price
DW12 and V6 codes command premium pricing due to complexity
items.cta: Compare Peugeot 807 engine prices from UK specialists

items.question: What engine codes fit my Peugeot 807?
items.answer: Your Peugeot 807 may have DW10 (RHR/RHS), DW12 (4HP/4HX), EW10 (RFN/RFJ), EW12 (3FZ) or ES9 (XFW) engine codes depending on variant, fuel type and production year.
keyPoints: Diesel codes: DW10 RHR/RHS/RHW (2.0L), DW12 4HP/4HX (2.2L)
Petrol codes: EW10 RFN/RFJ (2.0L), EW12 3FZ (2.2L), ES9 XFW (3.0L V6)
Enter your registration to verify exact code compatibility instantly
Engine code must match for ECU, mounts and ancillaries compatibility
items.cta: Verify your Peugeot 807 engine code with our free lookup tool

items.question: Is it worth replacing a Peugeot 807 engine?
items.answer: Replacing a Peugeot 807 engine is often cost-effective if the vehicle's market value exceeds £2,500 and the body/chassis is in good condition, especially for high-spec Executive or GT models.
keyPoints: Compare replacement cost against current vehicle valuation
Rebuilt engines include 12-month warranty adding long-term value
High-spec variants (Executive, GT) retain more value post-replacement
Consider selling for parts if bodywork is poor or mileage exceeds 150k
items.cta: Get a tailored Peugeot 807 engine replacement quote today

items.question: What is the most common Peugeot 807 engine problem?
items.answer: EGR valve clogging on DW10 diesel engines and timing belt tensioner failure on DW12 units are the most frequently reported Peugeot 807 engine problems driving replacement enquiries.
keyPoints: EGR clogging causes reduced power and limp mode at 60k-90k miles
DW12 timing tensioner failure risks catastrophic valve damage if ignored
Injector seal leaks and turbo actuator faults also common on high-mileage units
Regular servicing and using quality oil can extend engine life significantly
items.cta: Compare rebuilt Peugeot 807 engines with upgraded failure-point components

items.question: How long does a Peugeot 807 engine replacement take?
items.answer: A Peugeot 807 engine replacement typically takes 1-2 days for supply & fit once the engine is sourced, with next-day delivery available on many rebuilt units from UK specialists.
keyPoints: Used engines may require longer sourcing time depending on availability
Rebuilt/reconditioned units often available for next-day UK delivery
Garage labour time is typically 8-12 hours depending on accessibility
Allow extra time for ECU coding or ancillary component replacement if needed
items.cta: Find Peugeot 807 engine supply & fit deals with fast turnaround

items.question: What warranty comes with Peugeot 807 replacement engines?
items.answer: All Peugeot 807 replacement engines supplied through EngineMarket include a Peugeotmum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty from vetted UK specialists, covering parts and labour for peace of mind.
keyPoints: Warranty covers mechanical failure of supplied engine components
Unlimited mileage terms apply across the UK mainland
Labour warranty included when supply & fit service is selected
Always confirm exact warranty terms with your chosen supplier before ordering
items.cta: Compare Peugeot 807 engine warranty terms from trusted suppliers

items.question: How do I find my Peugeot 807 engine code?
items.answer: Your Peugeot 807 engine code is stamped on the engine block near the cylinder head, listed in the vehicle logbook (V5C), or visible on the VIN plate under the bonnet or driver's door sill.
keyPoints: Common locations: engine block stamp, V5C logbook section D.2, VIN plate sticker
Codes follow format like RHR, 4HP, RFN indicating family and variant
Enter registration on our site for instant DVLA-verified code identification
Correct code ensures compatibility with ECU, mounts and emissions hardware
items.cta: Identify your Peugeot 807 engine code instantly with our free tool

items.question: Can I fit a different engine in my Peugeot 807?
items.answer: Fitting a different engine in your Peugeot 807 is possible with same-family codes (e.g., DW10 to DW10) but requires ECU adaptation, mount verification and potential ancillary component changes.
keyPoints: Cross-family swaps (diesel to petrol) require extensive modification and are not recommended
Same-family code swaps may need ECU reprogramming for immobiliser compatibility
Professional installation advised to ensure emissions compliance and safety
EngineMarket specialists can advise on compatible swap options for your variant
items.cta: Enquire about Peugeot 807 engine compatibility with our technical team

items.question: Where can I buy a Peugeot 807 engine near me?
items.answer: EngineMarket connects you with 100+ vetted UK Peugeot 807 engine specialists offering nationwide delivery, so you can compare local and national suppliers for the best price and service.
keyPoints: Network includes breakers, rebuilders and specialist garages across the UK
Filter by location, price, warranty terms and supply & fit availability
All suppliers are rated and reviewed by real Peugeot 807 owners
Next-day delivery available on many rebuilt units to UK mainland addresses
items.cta: Compare Peugeot 807 engine suppliers near you with our free marketplace

items.question: Do Peugeot 807 engines need ECU coding after replacement?
items.answer: Most Peugeot 807 engine replacements are plug-and-play with same-code units, but later models may require ECU adaptation or immobiliser pairing using specialist diagnostic equipment.
keyPoints: Same engine code swaps typically require minimal or no coding
Phase 2 models (2007+) with CAN bus systems may need immobiliser sync
Professional installation includes diagnostic check and coding if required
Always confirm coding requirements with your chosen supplier before ordering
items.cta: Get quotes for Peugeot 807 engine replacement with coding included
